---
title: "Home"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    css: styles.css
page-layout: full
---

# {#top}

::: {.topnav}
[RS](#top){.logo} [Home](#top){.navlink} [About](#about){.navlink} [Education](#education){.navlink} [Experience](#experience){.navlink} [Skills](#skills){.navlink} [Projects](#projects){.navlink} [Objective](#objective){.navlink} [Contact](#contact){.navlink}
:::

# Roshan Shifna Niyas

## MBA Candidate | Banking and Customer Service Professional

I am an MBA candidate at University Canada West with hands-on experience in banking, finance support, and customer service. My background has helped me build strong skills in financial transaction handling, client service, communication, and professionalism in fast-paced environments.

[View Experience](experience.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [Contact Me](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}

## Professional Profile

I am building my career in the banking and financial services sector. I am especially interested in roles where I can apply my strengths in customer relationship support, transaction accuracy, financial awareness, and service excellence.

## Quick Highlights

- Based in Vancouver, British Columbia
- MBA Candidate at University Canada West
- Banking experience at Sampath Bank PLC
- Finance support experience as an Accounts Assistant
- Strong communication, teamwork, and MS Office skills
